items.d: In the middle: not the most and not the smallest.
items.s: The ___ rainfall here is 120 inches of rain every year.
items.hintDe: In der Mitte -- nicht am meisten, nicht am wenigsten.

items.d: A heavy metal tool for breaking a tree into small pieces.
items.s: The man put down his heavy metal ___ next to the tree.
items.hintDe: Schweres Metallwerkzeug, um Holz zu spalten.

items.d: Under a thing, not over it.
items.s: The temperature will be ___ 0 degrees tomorrow.
items.hintDe: Unter etwas, nicht darüber.

items.d: A tool with two glasses for looking at a thing far away.
items.s: I look at the stars at night with my ___ .
items.hintDe: Werkzeug mit zwei Gläsern -- für weit Entferntes.

items.d: Giving a lot of light.
items.s: The stars were very ___ in the sky last night.
items.hintDe: Voller Licht, leuchtend.

items.d: The work that a man or woman does for many years.
items.s: She wants to be a doctor for many years. It will be a long ___ for her.
items.hintDe: Die Arbeit, die man viele Jahre lang macht.

items.d: A day when grey clouds are over you and you cannot look at the sun.
items.s: It is very ___ today. The sky is grey and I think it will rain.
items.hintDe: Der Himmel ist grau, keine Sonne.

items.d: The land next to the sea.
items.s: We had a day at the ___ , next to the sea.
items.hintDe: Das Land direkt am Meer.

items.d: A temperature that makes you want a thick jacket and a hat.
items.s: Wear a thick jacket and a hat because it is very ___ outside.
items.hintDe: Zieh eine dicke Jacke an.

items.d: Not hot, but not really cold.
items.s: In the day it is hot, but at night it is quite ___ .
items.hintDe: Nicht heiß, aber auch nicht richtig kalt.

items.d: How we show how hot or cold it is, with a number like 20.
items.s: Tomorrow it will be 25 ___ -- nice and hot!
items.hintDe: Damit misst man die Temperatur, z. B. 25°.

items.d: Having no rain and no wet weather.
items.s: We had very ___ weather for our holidays last year. It did not rain at all.
items.hintDe: Kein Regen, kein Wasser.

items.d: A very bright, fast thing in the sky in a storm.
items.s: There was a ___ in the sky, bright like the sun for one second.
items.hintDe: Ein ganz kurzes, helles Licht am Himmel.

items.d: A thick grey cloud near the ground, so you cannot look very well.
items.s: Heavy ___ in the South will clear up in the afternoon.
items.hintDe: Dichte, graue Wolke direkt am Boden.

items.d: When grey clouds come down near the ground and you cannot look very well.
items.s: Drive carefully. It is very ___ this morning and you cannot look very well.
items.hintDe: Du siehst kaum die Straße.

items.d: What the weather will be like, that you can read or watch before it happens.
items.s: The ___ is very good for tomorrow -- hot and sunny.
items.hintDe: Sie sagt dir das Wetter für morgen voraus.

items.d: Numbers and letters that show you how to work it out.
items.s: We used a ___ with numbers and letters to work it out.
items.hintDe: Zahlen und Buchstaben zum Ausrechnen.

items.d: Most of the time, usually.
items.s: Death Valley is ___ hot, dry and sunny all year.
items.hintDe: Meistens, in der Regel.

provenance.note: The headword is a fixed spoken greeting with no in-bank near-synonyms, so distractors are other in-bank lexical items that are clearly not a goodbye phrase.

items.d: A good thing you tell a friend before they go.
items.s: Goodbye! ___ Enjoy the sunshine!
items.hintDe: Nettes Abschiedsgrußwort -- mit Rufzeichen!

items.d: A storm with very strong water from the sky.
items.s: After the storm, the ___ came down and my clothes were wet.
items.hintDe: Sehr starker Regen -- du wirst schnell nass.

items.d: The feeling that good weather will come.
items.s: Do not give up. There is still ___ .
items.hintDe: Das Gefühl, dass etwas Gutes kommt.

items.d: A very high temperature, when you want a cold drink and go to the beach.
items.s: It is so ___ today! Let's go to the beach and have a swim in the sea.
items.hintDe: Sehr warm -- ab zum Schwimmen!

items.d: A small length, like 2.54 centimetres.
items.s: My tablet screen is about six ___ wide.
items.hintDe: Kleines Längenmaß, ca. 2,54 cm.

items.d: Not too hot and not too cold.
items.s: The cold months here are quite ___ . It is not too hot and not too cold.
items.hintDe: Nicht zu heiß und nicht zu kalt.

items.d: A long length, about 1.6 kilometres.
items.s: Seathwaite is one ___ away from Seatoller.
items.hintDe: Langes Längenmaß, ca. 1,6 km.

items.d: What the weather will probably be like in the days to come.
items.s: The ___ for the weekend is hot and sunny.
items.hintDe: Wie das Wetter in den nächsten Tagen wird.

items.d: All the rain from the sky in a place over a year.
items.s: The average ___ here is 120 inches of rain every year.
items.hintDe: Der ganze Regen an einem Ort, z. B. in einem Jahr.

items.d: A day with grey clouds and a lot of rain.
items.s: Wear a jacket. It is going to be a ___ day with a lot of rain.
items.hintDe: Nimm den Regenschirm mit.

items.d: A row of numbers from one to ten for giving a mark.
items.s: On a ___ from 1 to 10, how good was your day?
items.hintDe: Eine Reihe von Zahlen, z. B. 1 bis 10.

items.d: How high the land is over the big water below.
items.s: Death Valley is 282 feet below ___ .
items.hintDe: Die Höhe des Meeres -- Bezugslinie für Höhen.

items.d: Short chat about the weather or the weekend.
items.s: There is lots of ___ about the weather. People have these short, nice talks every day.
items.hintDe: Kurzes, nettes Reden, z. B. übers Wetter.

items.d: A day when everything outside is cold and white.
items.s: It was a cold, ___ day and the children played in the white snow outside.
items.hintDe: Denk an einen Tag mit viel Schnee.

items.d: A day with lots of light, when you can look up at the sun.
items.s: It is a ___ day with lots of light -- perfect for a picnic in the park.
items.hintDe: Viel Licht, perfekt fürs Picknick.

items.d: The bright light from the sun on a nice day.
items.s: There will be lots of ___ tomorrow. Perfect weather for a picnic.
items.hintDe: Das helle Licht der Sonne.

items.d: When your skin becomes darker because of the sun.
items.s: You have a great ___ ! Were you on holiday in the sun?
items.hintDe: Deine Haut wird durch die Sonne dunkler.

items.d: How hot or cold it is.
items.s: The ___ dropped to 0 degrees last night.
items.hintDe: Sagt, wie warm oder kalt es ist.

items.d: So close and heavy, like grey fog in the morning.
items.s: There is ___ fog here, so drive carefully.
items.hintDe: Dicht und schwer, kaum Platz dazwischen.

items.d: All the time, from January to December.
items.s: It is usually sunny ___ , from January to December.
items.hintDe: Das ganze Jahr, von Jänner bis Dezember.

items.d: Bad weather with dark clouds, a big noise and a bright flash of light in the sky.
items.s: We stayed inside because of the big ___ last night, with its big noise and bright flashes of light.
items.hintDe: Donner, Blitz und dunkle Wolken zusammen.

provenance.note: Carrier uses the in-context form 'mad about' (+ noun); the headword 'to be mad about sth.' keeps its bank annotation verbatim in `w`.

items.d: To like a thing very, very much.
items.s: My sister is ___ horses. She loves them very much.
items.hintDe: Etwas ganz, ganz toll finden.

items.d: When bad weather ends and the sky becomes nice again.
items.s: The bad weather will ___ in the afternoon and the sun will come out.
items.hintDe: Das schlechte Wetter geht, der Himmel wird wieder schön.

items.d: To keep going and not go away.
items.s: The bad weather will ___ all day and will not go away.
items.hintDe: Es geht weiter, hört nicht auf.

items.d: To make money for the work you do.
items.s: Most people do not ___ money with their job.
items.hintDe: Geld für deine Arbeit bekommen.

items.d: To slowly go away so that a new thing can come.
items.s: The clouds in the morning will ___ to sun in the afternoon.
items.hintDe: Etwas geht weg, etwas Neues kommt.

items.d: To look again so a thing is done well.
items.s: ___ you close the windows before you go!
items.hintDe: Schau noch einmal, dass alles passt.

items.d: To write it down so you can keep it.
items.s: Scientists write down and ___ the temperatures every day.
items.hintDe: Etwas aufschreiben und behalten.

items.d: To go up and not come down.
items.s: The temperatures will ___ to 20 degrees.
items.hintDe: Nach oben gehen, höher werden.

items.d: To give out light.
items.s: The sun will come out and ___ on us all day.
items.hintDe: Licht geben, leuchten.

items.d: Going nearer and nearer to a place or a time.
items.s: It will be sunny ___ the end of the week.
items.hintDe: Immer näher zu einem Ort oder einer Zeit hin.

items.d: The man or woman who shows you the sun and rain on the news.
items.s: The ___ on the news showed the weather map for tomorrow.
items.hintDe: Diese Person sagt im Fernsehen das Wetter an.

items.d: In or from the west, where the sun is in the evening.
items.s: In Austria, the high mountains are in the west. The ___ mountains are very high.
items.hintDe: Im Westen, dort wo abends die Sonne steht.

items.d: Covered with rain, not dry.
items.s: All my clothes are ___ because of the rain.
items.hintDe: Voller Wasser, nicht trocken.

items.d: When you must hold on to your hat because the trees are not still.
items.s: Hold your hat! It is very ___ outside and the trees are not still.
items.hintDe: Halt deinen Hut fest!
